company.name: Rocking (PTY) LTD
company.registeredOffice: Unit A3, Westlake Square, Westlake Drive, Westlake, 7945, South Africa

doc.projectIntro: Pricing for a Cisco Catalyst 9200L 24-port PoE+ switch with Network Essentials, SmartNet 8x5xNBD support, and Cisco DNA Essentials licensing, delivered to Cape Town. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.detail: C9200L-24P-4G-E — 24-port PoE+, 4 x 1G uplinks, Network Essentials
Estimated — final shipping confirmed on dispatch to Cape Town

doc.summaryNote: Pricing is based on imported Cisco hardware and is subject to exchange-rate movement and OEM price changes until order confirmation.
terms: This quote is valid for 7 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
Pricing is subject to exchange-rate movement (quoted at ≤ R16.84/US$) and OEM price changes, and is confirmed at order placement.
Payment is due in full prior to order placement.
Delivery lead time is subject to Cisco/OEM stock availability.
Shipping is estimated; the final shipping cost is confirmed on dispatch to Cape Town.
Hardware remains the property of Rocking until paid in full.

banking.branch: Blue Route Mall, Tokai Road, Tokai, 7945
banking.reference: Please use quote number as payment reference.
